name: booking-calendar
summary: Appointment booking: resources + availability + bookings tables, RLS, DB-enforced no-double-book, open-slot query, book/cancel, hook + stub.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_bookings.sql (resources/availability public-read; bookings own; unique slot prevents double-book)
supabase db reset && supabase test db
Seed a resource + availability rows, then use useBooking(resourceId) to list open slots and book one.
Pairs with payments (charge on booking) and activity-inbox (confirm/remind).
Replace src/features/booking/ui/booking-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
